detail: Full type-107 walk (80 chunks / 50k blocks) proves MonkeyKing (0x400000af) first explicit (5,1) mMaxHP at 77278ms; other heroes accept at 267ms. Early MonkeyKing packets carry combat-index floats without (5,0)/(5,1). Not a parse/filter/chunk miss. Carry-forward densify covers 1548/1566 Replay API frames after firstAll10; the 18 early frames (60000–77000ms) cannot honestly set hpKnown. calculatorReady stays false because validate requires hpKnown on every frame. Do not invent HP, trim, or CreateHero-order bind to close the gap.

blocker.detail: Gates A+B1+B2 trusted (CastSpellAns identity, PE combat wire table, UpgradeSpellAns ranks) but calculatorReady needs hpKnown on every Replay API frame. MonkeyKing (0x400000af) first explicit mMaxHP at ~77278ms (others ~267ms); densify covers frames after firstAll10=77278ms (1548 samples) — early frames cannot honestly set hpKnown without inventing HP. Terminal wire gap.
